column1: # label: The Beginning (ONE OK ROCK)
# The Japanese lines of blob.txt only (English lyric lines and section tags
# stay in the blob). One row per line, in order of first appearance — repeated
# chorus lines are listed once. Columns: japanese / english.
japanese
でも譲れないもの
column2: But there are things I won't give up

column1: 握ったこの手は離さない
column2: I won't let go of this hand I've grasped

column1: 狂おしいほど刹那の艶麗
column2: A fleeting beauty, maddening enough to drive you wild

column1: 愁いを含んだ閃光 眼光は感覚的衝動
column2: A flash laced with sorrow; my piercing gaze, a sensory impulse

column1: 何もないように映ってるだけ
column2: It only appears as though there is nothing

column1: ただ隠せないもの
column2: Yet there are things I simply can't hide

column1: 飾ったように見せかけてる
column2: Putting on a show, as if all dressed up

column1: 悲しみと切なさの艶麗
column2: The beauty of sadness and aching longing

column1: くだけて泣いて咲いて散った この思いは
column2: Shattered, weeping, blooming, scattered — these feelings of mine

column1: このままじゃ まだ終わらせる事は出来ないでしょ？
column2: I can't let it end like this just yet, can I?

column1: 何度くたばりそうでも
column2: No matter how many times I feel ready to drop dead

column1: 朽ち果てようとも 終わりはないさ
column2: Even if I rot away, there is no end

column1: 握りしめた 失わぬようにと
column2: I clenched it tight, so as not to lose it

column1: 手を広げれば こぼれ落ちそうで
column2: If I open my hand, it feels like it'll spill away

column1: 失うものなどなかった 日々の惰性を捨てて
column2: Casting off the inertia of days when I had nothing to lose

column1: 君を
